plan_metadata.name: group  validation customize AzureAI in copilot

steps.description: Click the "Message Copilot" text input box in the M365 Copilot web chat interface for the agent "vscuse_app_bcgt4local," positioning the cursor at the start of the input field.

parameters.text: Tell me the history of Contoso Electronics, format in a table.

steps.description: Enter "Tell me the history of Contoso Electronics, format in a table." into the "Message Copilot" input box in the M365 Copilot web app, under the agent labeled "vscuse_app_bcgt4local".
Press the Enter key in the message input box of the M365 Copilot chat interface to submit the query: "Tell me the history of Contoso Electronics, format in a table".
